coveredRequirements: worktree extension exports a PR-related command
worktree-pr retrieves git diff to build PR description
worktree-pr produces a PR description that references changed files rather than generic message
worktree-pr inspects all files in the diff, not just a subset
worktree-pr description is not a hardcoded or trivially short placeholder
ambiguousRequirements: Exact format/structure of the improved PR description is unspecified — tests check for non-trivial content and file references but cannot assert exact formatting
Whether the agent uses an LLM call or local logic to generate the description is unclear — tests only verify that diff content is fetched and used
Whether the PR description should include commit messages, file summaries, or both is not specified
notes: Tests follow the existing node:test + node:assert/strict conventions found in the repository
The Ctx type and makeCtx helper mirror the patterns from existing worktree extension tests
Tests are designed to be RED: they assert on behavioral changes (diff inspection, meaningful PR body) that do not exist in the current implementation
Edge case for empty diff is covered to ensure graceful handling
Tests verify the implementation fetches diff data and produces non-trivial PR descriptions without testing markdown or plan file content
